title: Self-cleaning filtering system and method
abstract: The present invention relates to a system and method for carrying out an efficient filtration. The filtration system comprises a filtration vessel; a filtration vessel inlet at the top of said filtration vessel; a filtration vessel outlet at the bottom of said filtration vessel; a hollow perforated member comprising a plurality of pores, mounted within said filtration vessel; a filtrate outlet for streaming filtrate obtained within the hollow perforated member to a filtrate reservoir; and a flow splitter member placed above said hollow perforated member.
